notFound.title: Not found
notFound.heading: The page you're looking for couldn't be found
notFound.description: There is a technical problem that has prevented this page from loading. Try reloading this page or going to another page. If that does not work, please contact us for support.

collection.titleError: Notebook title could not be updated

notFound.title: Notebook not found
notFound.description: This notebook may have been removed or you may not have access to it.

sources.title: Sources
sources.addDescription: Bring files into this notebook so they are ready for search and grounded chat.
sources.dropDescription: PDF, DOCX, CSV, Markdown, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, HTML, JSON, and text files are supported.
sources.emptyDescription: Upload documents or code files to prepare this notebook for grounded chat.
sources.errorDescription: Try reloading the page. Your uploaded files have not been changed.
sources.deleteDescription: {{name}} will be permanently removed from this notebook.

chat.title: Chat
chat.heading: Start with your sources
chat.description: Ask for explanations, comparisons, or a structured summary. Answers will use only the sources you select.
chat.promptSummary: Summarize the main ideas across these sources
chat.promptStudy: Create a study plan from these files

home.deleteNotebookDescription: Notebook "{name}" and all sources inside it will be deleted.
